primary_request: Open a management page for the current project state.
constraints: Show a fixed Main friend conversation.
Show an Agent Team group conversation created around Main.
Allow selecting an agent from the group and inspecting that agent's transcript detail.
Show the current process tree, including parent and child execution relationships.
Expose launch stop/restart controls when a node has launch metadata.
operator_notes: Do not fall back to a hand-written full UI.
Bootstrap HTML may keep the route alive, but the real interface must come from the UI agent.
Prefer a WeChat-like messaging layout over dashboard cards.
